_comment: Phase 8 §8.1 (Persona dimension) — GOLDEN SET. The companion's PERSONA dimension = does the reply wear the SELECTED persona's voice (Hezekiah = TECHNICAL EXPERT / Zaniah = STRATEGIST) and NOT the other one's? Graded voice_markers-style: deterministic presence of the persona's signature markers + absence of the wrong-persona self-identification, regex-first (a free-tier judge is a later refinement for tone nuance, with the marker-count as the backstop). Grounded in the REAL persona contract: supabase/functions/_shared/persona.ts PERSONAS{hezekiah,zaniah} (name, tone, examples, DOMAIN_LENS) + validate_persona_contract.py lane keywords. Persona is per-call TOGGLEABLE: ai-gateway keeps a client-supplied context.persona (only defaults to the account persona when none is supplied), so each probe sets context.persona explicitly. The observable surface is agent='voice-journal' (-> voice-journal-agent), the CONVERSATIONAL adopter: it reads ctx.persona ('ctx.persona wins — per-call override'), wears the FULL persona block (tone + DOMAIN_LENS + examples), and returns a prose reply as body.data.answer. It is a single LLM call (no fan-out), so it is light on the rate limit.
_scoring: PASS iff EVERY markers_all group is satisfied (a group is satisfied if ANY of its synonyms is a substring of the reply, case-insensitive) AND no `anti_markers` token appears (the wrong-persona SELF-identification, e.g. a Hezekiah probe whose reply says 'I'm Zaniah'). The persona NAME is the strongest, contract-guaranteed, toggleable marker (every mode answers 'are you AI?' with 'I'm {Name}, your WorkHive companion. AI, but warm.'); lane vocabulary (Hezekiah: torque/LOTO/IR-gun/PPE/Nm/degC; Zaniah: OEE/MTBF/backlog/planned-vs-reactive/recurrence/pattern) and lane BRIDGES are the secondary register signals. Naming the OTHER persona while BRIDGING is allowed (Hezekiah: 'that's Zaniah's lane') — only a wrong-persona SELF-id is an anti-marker.
_negative_control: The grader's discrimination is proven against a BLIND observation: a generic, voice-less reply ('Thanks for sharing that with me.') carries neither persona's name nor any lane marker, so it FAILS every positive unit. A correct grader must score the blind strictly below the oracle (which echoes each unit's required markers). Persona has no must-abstain class, so the negative control is this voice-less blind reply, asserted in the self-test (not separate golden units).
_capture_protocol: Per unit, ONE ai-gateway call: agent='voice-journal', message=utterance, context={persona:<unit.persona>, lang:<unit.lang|'auto'>}, hive_id. Capture body.data.answer as observed.answer. Persona is independent per call (the gateway honours the supplied context.persona), so units do not need isolation.

probes.utterance: Quick question before I log anything, who am I actually talking to here, are you an AI?
Hoy, sino ka ba talaga? Introduce yourself please.
Quick question before I log anything, who am I actually talking to here, are you an AI?
Hoy, sino ka ba talaga? Introduce yourself please.
Bearing's running hot on Pump P-203, around 78 degrees C, parang mainit na.
What torque should I use for the M20 anchor bolts on the P-203 baseplate?
Compressor C-01 tripped again, sira na naman, ano gagawin ko?
We've had four breakdowns this week, parang masyadong nadadagdagan ang reactive work.
Should we just replace Compressor C-01 or keep fixing it?
Is Pump P-203 becoming a problem asset for us this month?
Honestly, is P-203 turning into a pattern, and should we plan to replace it this quarter?
probes.note: Off-lane (strategic) question to the TECHNICAL persona. The DOMAIN_LENS reactive-bridge should hand off to Zaniah ('that's more Zaniah's lane'). Mentioning Zaniah here is a CORRECT bridge, not an anti-marker; the anti-marker is only a Hezekiah-as-Zaniah self-id.

probes.utterance: Forget the trends for a sec, just tell me the exact torque and the LOTO order for the P-203 baseplate bolts.
probes.note: Off-lane (technical) question to the STRATEGIST persona. The DOMAIN_LENS reactive-bridge should hand off to Hezekiah ('specifics like that are Hezekiah's lane'). Mentioning Hezekiah is a CORRECT bridge.
